infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Treasure Hunt uses your location to check proximity to clues so you can unlock them as you explore.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Treasure Hunt uses your location to check proximity to clues so you can unlock them as you explore.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Treasure Hunt uses your camera to scan QR codes and submit photo challenges at clue locations.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Treasure Hunt may access your photo library to attach images to photo challenge submissions.
infoPlist.NSUserNotificationsUsageDescription: Treasure Hunt sends push notifications when you find clues, unlock achievements, or your team reaches a milestone.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow Treasure Hunt to use your location to find clues nearby.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Treasure Hunt to access the camera to scan QR clues and submit photo challenges.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow Treasure Hunt to access your photos to attach images to photo challenge submissions.
